title: Local businesses celebrated at Best of Mossel Bay awards ceremony
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's very best in business were celebrated today, 26 September at the Best of Mossel Bay Reader's Choice Awards.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay's very best in business were celebrated today, 26 September at the Best of Mossel Bay Reader's Choice Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Held at the Misty Valley Farm just outside Hartenbos, local business owners and representatives gathered at the venue for the second installment of the Best of Mossel Bay awards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group Editors CEO Servaas de Kock addressed the attendees, congratulating them on their nominations and subsequent awards. This year, there were 155 categories, garnering over 29 000 votes.","html":"Group Editors CEO Servaas de Kock addressed the attendees, congratulating them on their nominations and subsequent awards. This year, there were 155 categories, garnering over 29 000 votes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This means Mossel Bay Advertiser readers sent in the most amount of votes for this year's awards, beating out George Herald, Oudtshoorn Courant, Knysna-Plett Herald and Suid-Kaap Forum.","html":"This means Mossel Bay Advertiser readers sent in the most amount of votes for this year's awards, beating out George Herald, Oudtshoorn Courant, Knysna-Plett Herald and Suid-Kaap Forum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
